$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: kh-prod-readiness-S19 WP1.2 — re-baseline after Prettier+Knip step independence applied to ci.yml. Types 282→288 absorbs the post-baseline-capture main-track delta (S213/S214 near-dup + pipeline + dedup type exports whose consumers either inline-resolve or are ratification-pending). Triage carry to S20: identify the 6 specific new types and decide delete-or-wire individually. The bump itself unblocks CI now that Knip is independent of Prettier — the breach was hidden behind format-check fail-fast all of S17/S18.
